app.name: Finding A Bed Tonight
login.title: Sign In
login.oauth.noAccount: No account found for this email. Contact your CoC administrator to be added.
login.oauth.emailRequired: Your identity provider did not share your email address. Email is required for login.
login.oauth.error: OAuth2 login failed. Please try again or use email/password.
offline.banner: You are offline. Cached searches are still visible. Bed holds and updates will be queued and sent when you reconnect. DV referral requests require a connection.
data.age.tooltip.fresh: Updated in the last hour. Outreach workers trust this data.
data.age.tooltip.aging: 1–8 hours old. Data may be outdated — consider calling to confirm.
data.age.tooltip.stale: Over 8 hours old. Call the shelter before driving there.
data.age.tooltip.unknown: No update data available for this shelter.
shelter.name: Shelter Name
shelter.dvFlagDisabled: Contact your CoC administrator to change DV status
shelter.dvConfirmMessage: This will make the shelter address visible to all users including outreach workers without DV authorization. This action affects survivor safety.
import.hsds.dragDrop: Drag and drop an HSDS file here, or click to browse
import.211.dragDrop: Drag and drop a 211 CSV file here, or click to browse
import.211.accepts: Accepts .csv files — or press Enter to browse
import.quickStart.title: How to import shelters
import.quickStart.step2: Fill in your shelter data — one row per shelter
import.quickStart.step3: Upload the file here and review the preview before importing
import.quickStart.upsertNote: Re-importing will update existing shelters (matched by name + city) and create new ones.
import.quickStart.templateAria: Download blank CSV template for shelter import
import.quickStart.exampleAria: Download example CSV with sample shelter data
import.noDataRows: CSV file contains no data rows — only headers were found.
import.previewError: Failed to preview file. Please check the format.
search.title: Find a Bed
search.subtitle: Search available shelter beds in real time
search.placeholder: Search by shelter name or city...
search.error: Couldn't reach shelter data. Check your connection and try again.
search.resultCount: {count, plural, one {# shelter found} other {# shelters found}}
search.bedsAvailable: {count, plural, one {# bed available} other {# beds available}}
search.holdFailed: Could not hold bed. It may no longer be available.
reservations.title: My Reservations
surge.reasonPlaceholder: e.g., White Flag — overnight low below 32°F
surge.overflowHint: Cots, mats, and emergency space during surge
search.dvAddressHidden: Address withheld for safety — shared verbally after referral acceptance
referral.title: Request DV Shelter Referral
referral.subtitle: No client identifying information is stored. This referral contains only operational data.
referral.specialNeedsPlaceholder: Wheelchair, pets, medical needs (no client names)
referral.networkError: Could not reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
search.referralOffline: Referral requests need a connection. Call {phone} to request a referral by phone.
search.referralOfflineNoPhone: Referral requests need a connection. Move to an area with signal and try again.
referral.expiredError: This referral has expired and can no longer be accepted or rejected.
referral.rejectReason: Reason (do not include client identifying information)
referral.acceptedConfirm: Referral accepted — call shelter intake to arrange arrival
referral.shelterClosedGuidance: This shelter is no longer available. Contact your administrator for next steps.
referral.myReferralsLoadError: Could not load your DV referrals. Check your connection and try again.
coord.title: Shelter Dashboard
coord.subtitle: Update bed counts and availability for your shelters
coord.shelterCount: {count, plural, one {# assigned shelter} other {# assigned shelters}}
coord.error: Couldn't load your shelters. Check your connection and try again.
admin.title: Administration
admin.subtitle: Manage your continuum of care
admin.keyWarning: This key will not be shown again. Copy it now.
admin.label: Label
hmis.noVendors: No HMIS vendors configured. Add a vendor to enable automatic data push.
admin.oauth2.title: Identity Provider Configuration
admin.oauth2.testFailed: Could not reach OIDC discovery endpoint
admin.oauth2.deleteConfirm: This will prevent all users from logging in via {name}. Existing linked accounts will remain but SSO login will stop working.
admin.oauth2.secretNote: Client secret is stored securely and will not be displayed after saving.
admin.oauth2.updateSecret: Leave blank to keep existing secret
admin.observability.considerSurge: No active surge. Consider activating surge mode.
notifications.criticalBanner.cta: Review {count, plural, one {# pending escalation} other {# pending escalations}} →
dvEscalations.subtitle: Pending DV referrals across your continuum of care
dvEscalations.queue.empty: No pending DV referrals — every survivor in your area has a placement underway.
dvEscalations.queue.count: {count, plural, one {# referral waiting} other {# referrals waiting}}
dvEscalations.modal.title: Pending DV referral
dvEscalations.modal.approved: Approved placement at {shelterName}. The shelter is expecting them.
dvEscalations.modal.denied: Denied placement at {shelterName}. The outreach worker will be notified to find another bed.
dvEscalations.modal.piiWarning: Do not include client names, addresses, or other identifying information. This text is recorded in the audit trail.
dvEscalations.reassign.title: Reassign this referral
dvEscalations.reassign.advancedWarning: This option breaks the escalation chain. The named person becomes the single thread of accountability for this referral until they act on it.
dvEscalations.policy.title: Escalation policy for DV referrals
dvEscalations.policy.subtitle: Per-tenant thresholds. Existing referrals keep their frozen policy — only new referrals snapshot changes.
dvEscalations.policy.mobileReadOnly: Edit on a larger screen — this view is read-only on mobile.
dvEscalations.policy.saved: Policy saved. New referrals will use this version.
dvEscalations.policy.error.idFormat: Threshold ID must be lowercase letters, digits, or underscores (1-32 chars)
dvEscalations.policy.error.idDuplicate: Threshold IDs must be unique within the policy
dvEscalations.policy.error.duration: Use ISO-8601 duration (e.g. PT1H, PT30M, PT2H30M)
dvEscalations.policy.error.monotonic: Threshold {index} must be later than the threshold above it
dvEscalations.policy.error.severity: Severity must be INFO, ACTION_REQUIRED, or CRITICAL
dvEscalations.policy.error.role: Recipient must be COORDINATOR, COC_ADMIN, OUTREACH_WORKER, or PLATFORM_ADMIN
dvEscalations.policy.error.recipientsEmp: Each threshold needs at least one recipient
dvEscalations.policy.error.empty: Policy must contain at least one threshold
dvEscalations.error.loadFailed: Could not load the queue. The system is still working — try refreshing.
dvEscalations.error.actionFailed: This action didn't go through. The referral may have already been handled — refresh to see the latest.
dvEscalations.error.claimedByOther: Another admin claimed this referral first. Refresh to see who has it.
analytics.noData: No utilization data available for this period
admin.holdDuration.label: Bed Hold Duration
admin.holdDuration.description: How long outreach workers can hold a bed before auto-expiry. Hospital deployments may set 120-180 minutes for discharge workflows.
password.change.title: Change Password
password.change.tooShort: Password must be at least 12 characters
password.change.ssoOnly: Your password is managed by your SSO provider
password.change.error: Failed to change password. Please try again.
password.reset.title: Reset Password for {username}
password.reset.success: Password reset. {username} will need to sign in again.
password.reset.ssoOnly: This user authenticates via SSO. Password cannot be reset here.
password.reset.error: Failed to reset password. Please try again.
admin.user.deactivateConfirmMessage: {name} will be unable to log in. Their existing sessions will be terminated immediately. This can be reversed.
notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.screenReaderCount: {count, plural, one {# new notification} other {# new notifications}}
notifications.referralResponded: A shelter responded to your referral
notifications.surgeActivated: White Flag activated — open overflow capacity
notifications.surgeDeactivated: White Flag deactivated — overflow capacity closed
notifications.reservationExpired: Your bed hold at {shelterName} has expired
notifications.criticalBanner: {count, plural, one {# urgent notification requires action} other {# urgent notifications require action}}
coordinator.referralBanner: {count, plural, one {# referral waiting for review} other {# referrals waiting for review}}
queue.pending: {count, plural, one {# pending action} other {# pending actions}}
queue.title: Queued Actions
search.holdQueued: Hold queued — will send when online
search.holdExpired: Hold request expired (queued {minutes} min ago). Search again?
search.holdConflict: Bed was taken while offline. Search again?
search.holdFailed.retry: Could not reach server. Will retry automatically.
coord.updateQueued: Update queued — will send when online
totp.enrollDescription: Add an extra layer of security to your account. You'll need an authenticator app like Google Authenticator or Authy.
totp.scanInstructions: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app, then enter the 6-digit code below to confirm.
totp.manualEntry: Can't scan? Enter this code manually
totp.enterCode: Enter the 6-digit code from your app
totp.invalidCode: The code is incorrect. Make sure your authenticator app is synced and try again.
totp.enrollError: Sign-in verification is not available on this server.
totp.codesWarning: Save these backup codes now. They will not be shown again. Print them and store in a safe place (e.g., sealed envelope in a locked drawer).
totp.storageGuidance: Each code can only be used once. If you lose your authenticator device, use a backup code to sign in.
totp.loginPrompt: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
totp.accessCodeDescription: Enter the access code your administrator gave you.
forgotPassword.title: Reset Your Password
forgotPassword.instructions: Enter your organization and email address. If an account exists, we'll send a reset link.
forgotPassword.checkEmailDetail: If an account exists with that email, a password reset link has been sent. The link is valid for 30 minutes.
resetPassword.title: Set New Password
resetPassword.success: Your password has been reset. Please sign in with your new password.
resetPassword.noToken: No reset token found. Please use the link from your email.
resetPassword.tooShort: Password must be at least 12 characters.
resetPassword.error: Failed to reset password. The link may have expired.
apiKey.revokeConfirmMessage: This will immediately deactivate the key "{label}" (****{suffix}). Any systems using this key will lose access. This cannot be undone.
apiKey.rotateConfirmMessage: This will generate a new key for "{label}" (****{suffix}). The old key will continue to work for 24 hours, then stop. Make sure to update your integration with the new key.
apiKey.label: Label
apiKey.col.label: Label
subscription.deleteConfirmMessage: This will permanently cancel the webhook for "{eventType}" to {url}. Pending deliveries will not be retried. This cannot be undone.
